name: Missing RLS Policies
finding: Multi-tenant SaaS must have Row Level Security from day 1. Retrofitting is extremely costly.
action: Add RLS policies to all tables that contain tenant data

name: Legacy Stripe Usage Records
finding: Stripe deprecated usage records API (2025-03-31). Use Meters API instead.

name: Missing Input Validation
finding: All user input must be validated at API boundaries using Zod or similar.
action: Add Zod schemas to all API route handlers

name: Missing API Rate Limiting
finding: Production SaaS APIs need rate limiting to prevent abuse and control costs.
action: Add rate limiting middleware to all public API routes

name: Hardcoded Pricing
finding: Pricing should come from Stripe or config, not hardcoded values. Makes A/B testing impossible.
action: Move all pricing to Stripe price IDs or environment config

name: Missing Error Boundaries
finding: SaaS apps need error boundaries — a crash in billing shouldn't break the dashboard.
action: Add error.tsx to each route segment
